commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Control UI postMessage listener that accepts a gateway SSO token from allowed parent origins, applies it to UI settings, reconnects the gateway, and posts an acknowledgement.

PR surface: Source +114, Tests +160. Total +274 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for review blockers: source inspection shows the new module imports a non-exported SettingsHost type, and the token-change path only reconnects after host.connected is true. The real hosted SSO behavior itself has not been demonstrated.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-visible code changes and real hosted SSO proof; missing real behavior proof keeps this out of the repair queue.
